Bash("C:/Users/amala/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python311/python.exe" -c "
import ast, sys
files = [
    ''backend/app/fetchers/conflicts.py'',
    ''backend/app/fetchers/terrorism.py'',
    ''backend/app/fetchers/events.py'',
    ''backend/app/fetchers/news.py'',
    ''backend/app/fetchers/piracy.py'',
    ''backend/app/fetchers/notams.py'',
]
ok = True
for f in files:
    try:
        ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\)
        print\(f''OK: {f}''\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f''ERROR: {f}: {e}''\)
        ok = False
sys.exit\(0 if ok else 1\)
")
